title: Kitsure Large Cutlery Drawer Organiser for Kitchen - Adjustable Cutlery Tray for Effortless Utensil Sorting, Versatile Kitchen Storage & Organisation Solution, Black, 34.8 x 3.9 x 27.8~50.0 cm
features: SORTED AND ACCESSIBLE: Equipped with five small sections, this kitchen drawer organiser provides ample space for knives, forks, and spoons. The other two larger sections are perfect for kitchen tools like spatulas, whisks, and tongs. The clear organization ensures quick access to your utensils and tools, making cooking more efficient.

EXPANDABLE STORAGE: This utensil drawer organiser features an expandable design, allowing you to adjust its width between 27.8cm and 50.0cm. This flexibility enables it to fit perfectly into different drawers, maximizing space usage. Whether you have a compact or large drawer, the cutlery organiser adapts to your needs, keeping your utensils neat.

SAFSAFE TO USE: This cutlery tray for kitchen drawers is crafted from premium PP material, offering both durability and safety. Known for its resistance to cracking and scratching, it performs well even with frequent use. Made from BPA-free, non-toxic material, it is safe for storing food-related tools and utensils, providing peace of mind for you.

EFFORTLESS CLEANING: Maintain your Kitsure cutlery holder with ease! Simply wipe it with a damp cloth or rinse it with water to keep it spotless. You can also use dish soap for a deeper clean. This simple cleaning process keeps your cutlery organizer hygienic and ready for use at all times.

USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: With handles on both sides, this silverware organizer is designed for easy lifting and movement, allowing you to adjust its position effortlessly. Four silicone pads prevent this drawer organiser from sliding, protecting your drawer from wear. The practical design makes Kitsure the ideal kitchen storage solution for you!
